title: SenpaiHUD
description: Real-time player stats mod for MushMC's Bed Wars.
body:
# SenpaiHUD - BedWars Stats for MushMC

SenpaiHUD is a Minecraft mod designed specifically for players on the MushMC server. With a simple keypress, SenpaiHUD fetches and displays detailed BedWars statistics for all players currently in your lobby, helping you analyze your competition and teammates in real time.

## Features

- **Instant Stats:** View BedWars stats (score, wins, finals, FKDR, beds broken, level, winstreak, account type, ban blacklist count, and first login) for every player in your lobby.
- **Stylish GUI:** A clean, easy-to-read interface with sorting, color-coded ranks, and icons for premium accounts, new players, and ban warnings.
- **Smart Caching:** Fast performance with built-in caching for up to 500 players, ensuring stats load quickly and efficiently.
- **Scroll & Search:** Easily scroll through large lobbies and see all relevant stats at a glance.
- **Server Protection:** Only works on MushMC, ensuring fair use and compatibility.

## How to Use

1. Join the MushMC server.
2. Press the apostrophe key (`'`) to open the SenpaiHUD stats screen.
3. Instantly view and compare BedWars stats for everyone in your lobby.

## Requirements

- Minecraft Forge (1.8.x recommended)
- MushMC server

## Why SenpaiHUD?

SenpaiHUD gives you a competitive edge by letting you know who’s who in your BedWars lobby. Whether you’re looking for top players, new accounts, or potential cheaters, SenpaiHUD puts all the information at your fingertips.

> **Note:** This mod is exclusively for MushMC and will not function on other servers.
